scripts.build:launcher: dotnet publish ./tools/launcher/WarThunderResearchLauncher.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained false -p:PublishSingleFile=true -o ./launcher-dist && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Copy-Item -Force ./launcher-dist/WarThunderResearchCalculator.exe ./WarThunderResearchCalculator.exe"
